requirement_topic.en: NTA Type Approval — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment (Telecommunications Act 2053/1997)
requirement_topic.zh: NTA型号核准——无线/电信终端设备（《2053年电信法》1997年）
requirement_topic.zht: NTA型號核准——無線/電信終端設備（《2053年電信法》1997年）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT devices containing radio modules) must obtain an NTA Type Approval Certificate from the Nepal Telecommunications Authority (नेपाल दूरसञ्चार प्राधिकरण) before import or sale in Nepal. The NTA approval number must appear on the product label. Applications are submitted to NTA; test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are required. Approval is device-model-specific and must be renewed upon material change. No mutual recognition arrangement exists with CCC, SRRC, FCC, CE, or BIS. 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi is generally permitted; 5 GHz regulatory status is developing and must be confirmed with NTA.
summary.zh: 所有无线及电信终端设备（包括含无线模组的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网设备）在进口或于尼泊尔销售前，须从尼泊尔电信管理局（नेपाल दूरसञ्चार प्राधिकरण）取得NTA型号核准证书。产品标签须标注NTA核准编号。申请提交至NTA，须附国际认可实验室出具的测试报告。核准针对具体设备型号，实质变更后须重新申请。与CCC、SRRC、FCC、CE及BIS不存在相互认可安排。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi通常获准使用；5 GHz监管状态尚在完善中，须向NTA确认。
summary.zht: 所有無線及電信終端設備（包括含無線模組的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網裝置）在進口或於尼泊爾銷售前，須從尼泊爾電信管理局（नेपाल दूरसञ्चार प्राधिकरण）取得NTA型號核准證書。產品標籤須標注NTA核准編號。申請提交至NTA，須附國際認可實驗室出具的測試報告。核准針對具體設備型號，實質變更後須重新申請。與CCC、SRRC、FCC、CE及BIS不存在相互認可安排。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi通常獲准使用；5 GHz監管狀態尚在完善中，須向NTA確認。

standards_or_laws: Nepal Telecommunications Act 2053 (1997) — NTA type approval mandate
NTA Frequency Management Rules — 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz spectrum

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval (issued by MIIT) for intentional radiators and a MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment sold or connected to public networks in China. CCC certification under GB 4943.1 (safety) and GB/T 9254 (EMC) scope covers certain products. These approvals are not recognised by NTA and do not substitute Nepal NTA Type Approval.
summary.zh: 中国对有意辐射体要求SRRC无线电型号核准（由工业和信息化部颁发），对在中国销售或接入公共网络的电信终端设备要求工业和信息化部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC认证涵盖GB 4943.1（安全）及GB/T 9254（电磁兼容）范围内的部分产品。上述核准不被NTA承认，不可替代尼泊尔NTA型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國對有意輻射體要求SRRC無線電型號核准（由工業和信息化部頒發），對在中國銷售或接入公共網絡的電信終端設備要求工業和信息化部網絡接入許可（NAL）。CCC認證涵蓋GB 4943.1（安全）及GB/T 9254（電磁相容）範圍內的部分產品。上述核准不被NTA承認，不可替代尼泊爾NTA型號核准。

standards_or_laws: China Radio Regulation (SRRC) — MIIT Order No. 23 (2020 revision)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Telecom Terminal Equipment

gap.en: Full gap: SRRC, CCC, FCC, CE, and BIS approvals are not recognised by NTA. A standalone NTA Type Approval Certificate — with the NTA approval number printed on the product label — is mandatory for each device model before import into Nepal. 5 GHz band regulatory status is still developing in Nepal and requires separate NTA confirmation.
gap.zh: 完全差距：NTA不承认SRRC、CCC、FCC、CE及BIS核准。每款设备型号在进口至尼泊尔前，须取得独立的NTA型号核准证书，并在产品标签上印有NTA核准编号。5 GHz频段监管状态在尼泊尔尚在完善中，须另行向NTA确认。
gap.zht: 完全差距：NTA不承認SRRC、CCC、FCC、CE及BIS核准。每款設備型號在進口至尼泊爾前，須取得獨立的NTA型號核准證書，並在產品標籤上印有NTA核准編號。5 GHz頻段監管狀態在尼泊爾尚在完善中，須另行向NTA確認。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NTA Type Approval is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment imported into Nepal under the Telecommunications Act 2053 (1997). Chinese SRRC, CCC, FCC, CE, or other foreign approvals do not satisfy this requirement. Engage a locally registered importer/distributor, obtain test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory, submit an NTA type approval application, and ensure the NTA approval number appears on the product label before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《2053年电信法》（1997年），NTA型号核准对所有进口至尼泊尔的无线及电信终端设备均为强制要求。中国SRRC、CCC、FCC、CE或其他境外核准不满足此要求。建议委托本地注册进口商/分销商，从国际认可实验室取得测试报告，提交NTA型号核准申请，并确保产品标签在发货前印有NTA核准编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《2053年電信法》（1997年），NTA型號核准對所有進口至尼泊爾的無線及電信終端設備均為強制要求。中國SRRC、CCC、FCC、CE或其他境外核准不滿足此要求。建議委託本地註冊進口商/分銷商，從國際認可實驗室取得測試報告，提交NTA型號核准申請，並確保產品標籤在發貨前印有NTA核准編號。
